titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 1, no. 64: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 64. (A.R. No. 382 of 1924.) MĒLAPPAḺUVŪR, UDAIYARPALAIYAM TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the Chōḷēśvara shrine in the Agastyēśvara temple.

p.note: The identity of this Rājakēsarivarman with Sundarachōḷa is doubtful. This Rājakēsarivarman could be Rājarāja I also.

summary.p: This inscription refers to an endowment made in the 9th regnal year of Rājakēsarivarman (Sundarachōḷa) but it was given effect in the subsequent period ie during the reign of Uttamachōḷa.

It records that Vīrachōḻa Aṇukkaṉ Śiṟiyappi Maḻapāḍi of Avanigandharvvapuram made a gift of ten kaḻañju of gold for burning a perpetual lamp with one uḻakku of ghee daily to the shrine (situated) to the north of the temple of Mahādēva of Avanigandharvva-Īśvaragriham, a dēvadāna in Kuṉṟa-kkūṟṟam. During the sixteenth regnal year of Uttamachōḷa on the orders of Paḻuvēṭṭaraiyar Kaṇḍaṉ Maṟavaṉ, the two nagarattārs who were examining the śrīkāriyam of the temple received the gold for interest (ie supplying ghee for burning the lamp). Probably later, when the śrīkāriyam of the temple was being checked by Kauśikan Nakkan Māṟapirāṉ, the gold was taken over by the paṭṭuḍiyār-eḻuvar (seven priests, possibly of Avanigandharvva-Īśvaragriham), for arranging to burn the perpetual lamp.
Published in S.I.I. Vol. XIII No. 201.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . koirācakecaripaṉmaṟku yāṇṭu 9 Ā
vatu kuṉṟakkūṟṟattu devadāṉam Avaṉikandharvva
Īśvaragrahattu mahādevar vaṭavāy śrīkoyilukku A
vaṉikandharvvapurattu viracoḻa Aṇukkaṉ ciṟiyappi maḻapā
ṭi cantrātittavallum vaitta nontāviḷakku Oṉṟinik
ku paṭiyuḻakkiṉāl nicatamuḻakku neyyeriya vaitta poṉ
10 patiṉkaḻañcum śrīkopparakecaripaṉmarkku yāṇṭu Uttamacoḻarkku 16āvatu A
ṭikaḷ paḻu
veṭṭaraiyar kaṇṭaṉ maṟavaṉār Aruḷi ceyya śrī kāryyam Ārāyā niṟkka Iraṇṭu nakarattārum ciṟi
yappi maḻa
vāṭi vaitta poṉ patiṉkaḻañcum koṇṭu Iraṇṭu nakarattārum palicai Iṭṭuvārā niṟkiṉṟa poṉ patiṉkaḻa
ñcum śrīkāryyam Ārāyāniṉṟa kauśikan nakkan māṟapirāṉ Ārācciyil Ippoṉ patiṉkaḻañcum vāṅki koṇṭu
cantrādittaval Iravum pakalum Oru nontāviḷa
kku Erippom Ānom Ittaḷip pa
ṭṭuṭaiyom Eḻuvom Itu panmāheśvara rakṣai .§
Digital edition of SII 32, part 1, no. 64 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
